series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained to document the activity and business structure of each operator in the Business Enterprise (BE) Program. Records may include: correspondence, late/penalty letter, negative balance due letter, NSF letter, award letters, non-award letters; penalty log; OVRC nomination information; stipend invoices and information; grievance information; annual records review; annual vendors appraisal; upward mobility certificates; unassigned income invoices; and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: at least five (5) federal fiscal years or audited and when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: at least five (5) federal fiscal years or audited and when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
